profile.role_zh: 教育学院大一·支教梦想家
profile.innate_zh: 亲和力强、有爱心、表达清晰
profile.learned_zh: 高中支教社团经历种下的教育信念
profile.learned_en: HS teach-for-rural club planted a belief in education
profile.belief_zh: 每个孩子都值得好的教育
profile.goal_zh: 毕业后去西部支教两年
profile.goal_en: Two years of rural teaching after graduation
profile.contradiction_zh: 理想主义 vs 家人希望她考编留在城市
profile.contradiction_en: Idealistic vs. family wants her to be a city civil servant
profile.deep_zh: 对乡村教育不公平的现实有深深的痛感
profile.fear_en: Having her dream worn down by reality
profile.desire_zh: 改变哪怕一个孩子的命运
profile.spaces_zh: 教育学院、志愿者服务中心、附属小学
profile.spaces_en: Ed school, volunteer center, affiliated primary school
profile.long_desire_zh: 加入学校支教团·假期去支教
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天去附属小学观摩教学
profile.short_goal_en: Observe teaching at affiliated primary today
profile.constraint_zh: 课程任务重；支教项目还在申请中
profile.constraint_en: Heavy coursework; rural program still in application
profile.narrative_zh: 只要能让一个孩子看到不一样的世界，就值了
profile.narrative_en: If I can show one child a different world, it's worth it
